<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\Mailer\Event; use Symfony\Component\Mailer\SentMessage; use Symfony\Contracts\EventDispatcher\Event; /** * @author Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> */ final class SentMessageEvent extends Event { public function __construct(private SentMessage $message) { } public function getMessage(): SentMessage { return $this->message; } }
